---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Contact Prof. Ibrahim Niankara, Professor of Applied Economics, College of Business, Al Ain University. Founder of BRASS Digital Lab."
title-block-banner: false
---

<center>

**Prof. Ibrahim Niankara, PhD**

Finance & Banking Department

College of Business · Al Ain University — Abu Dhabi Campus

United Arab Emirates

Mobile: +971 50 164 2477

Email: <Ibrahim.niankara@aau.ac.ae>

**ORCID:** [0000-0001-7049-0859](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7049-0859){.external target="_blank"}

**Scopus Author ID:** [57200579496](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57200579496){.external target="_blank"}

**LinkedIn:** [ibrahim-niankara-299a3762](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ibrahim-niankara-299a3762/){.external target="_blank"}

</center>

---

<center>

## BRASS Digital Lab

**Regulatory Technology · Supervisory Technology · UAE Higher Education**

Founder & Director: Ibrahim Niankara, PhD

Website: [brassbe1982-bdlweb.share.connect.posit.cloud](https://brassbe1982-bdlweb.share.connect.posit.cloud/){.external target="_blank"}

Lab Research: [brassbe1982-bdlweb.share.connect.posit.cloud/research](https://brassbe1982-bdlweb.share.connect.posit.cloud/research/index.html){.external target="_blank"}

Email: <brassbe1982@gmail.com>

GitHub: [github.com/brassbe1982](https://github.com/brassbe1982){.external target="_blank"}

*Specialists in MoHESR OBF compliance platforms, KPI analytics,*
*and regulatory workflow engines built in R Shiny.*

*100% MoHESR OBF v11.5 Certified · 76 UAE HEIs in Scope · 4 Live Platforms*

</center>
